'''Nyxy''' was a [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented [[Rudrig/Legends|Rudrig]] and the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]] until being replaced by [[Thuv Shinev]] in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]].
